steps.title: Use the action clue
steps.content: The organization acts on its commitment by promoting photographers whose work reflects Indigenous lives and experiences. The blank needs a word meaning to demonstrate that commitment through action.

steps.title: Choose the demonstrative verb
steps.content: A means to end, B means to clarify, and C means to come before, none of which fit the act of promoting photographers. The remaining verb means demonstrates or makes evident. The answer is D.
